[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text visible in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- No extractable UI text, captions, labels, or written content detected.

# Notes

- The image appears to be a photo with no clearly readable text. If there is text on the clothing/accessories, it is too small/unclear to extract.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands in an outdoor, lush green garden setting, partially obscured by foliage. They are wearing a white t-shirt with a black and white graphic design, a black vest, a black and white striped scarf wrapped around their head and neck, and very baggy, dark gray cargo pants. A small, light yellow shoulder bag with chain details rests on a dark, round table to their left. The person is holding the scarf up to cover part of their face. The background features dark-colored outdoor furniture, including a bench and tables, surrounded by abundant greenery and tree branches. The lighting appears natural and somewhat diffused, creating a moody atmosphere with deep shadows and highlights. The color palette is dominated by dark greens, grays, black, and white, with a pop of yellow from the handbag. The style of the image is reminiscent of a candid street style or fashion photography shoot, with a slightly edgy and urban aesthetic.
